news.title: 2 kids hospitalized, 1 on ventilator after taking THC gummies in Gwinnett motel
news.summary: Two Gwinnett County children were hospitalized after taking THC gummies that police say belonged to their caregiver.

news.title: Concerns loom as board addresses future of Stone Mountain Park's police force
news.summary: Officials said Stone Mountain Park's police department will not be dismantled amid concerns raised at a board meeting on Monday.

news.title: 18-year-old arrested after alleged burnout at illegal car meet in Cobb County
news.summary: An arrest at a busy Cobb County shopping center is renewing concerns about illegal car meets and dangerous stunt driving.

news.title: DeKalb County police find woman dead, suspect injured after early morning shooting
news.summary: A woman was found dead from a gunshot wound in DeKalb County, and a suspect was detained nearby, police report. The investigation is ongoing.

news.title: DeKalb County deputy arrested, fired after investigation into misuse of license plate camera system
news.summary: "The misuse of law enforcement technology or confidential information for any unauthorized purpose is a serious breach of the public's trust," the sheriff said.

news.title: Ex-Georgia officer sentenced in deadly hit-and-run
news.summary: Godreque Ravetto Newsom Sr. is going to prison for the deadly hit-and-run on I-85 near 17th Street NW in 2024

news.title: Sandy Springs Police release video of arrest as suspect car slammed onto windshield of officer's cruiser
news.summary: Sandy Springs PD said on Facebook the incident occurred with a suspect wanted on drug charges and "ties to a larger criminal organization."

news.title: Woman arrested for wrong-way driving on I-85 in Gwinnett County
news.summary: A 27-year-old woman faces multiple charges after driving the wrong way on Interstate 85 and striking a police vehicle on July 4, according to the Gwinnett County Police Department.

news.title: Suspect lands car on Sandy Springs patrol cruiser during chase
news.summary: A federal drug suspect tied to a large criminal organization was arrested Friday after his vehicle launched onto a Sandy Springs police cruiser during a chase last week, authorities said.
